sales.title:
Stack's Bowers Galleries (& Ponterio) - January 2026 NYINC Auction, Lot 45194 — SYRIA. Seleukid Kingdom. Antiochos I Soter, 281-261 B.C. AR Drachm (4.17 gms), Laodikeia Mint. NGC Ch VF. Edge Chip, Brushed.
To view all items from the Cookie Family Collection, click  here.
HGC-9, 1
sales.description:
SYRIA. Seleukid Kingdom. Antiochos I Soter, 281-261 B.C. AR Drachm (4.17 gms), Laodikeia Mint. NGC Ch VF. Edge Chip, Brushed.
To view all items from the Cookie Family Collection, click  here.
HGC-9, 133; SC-358.5. In the name of Seleukos I. Obverse: Head of Herakles right, wearing lion skin; Reverse: Zeus seated left on throne, holding eagle and scepter; controls to left and below throne. RARE.

From the Cookie Family Collection.

Ex: Classical Numismatic Group 76 (9/2007) Lot # 781.

Estimate...
